scripts.dev:api: cd apps/api && source venv/bin/activate && python3 -m uvicorn api_server:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8080
scripts.test:api: cd apps/api && python3 -m py_compile api_server.py mongo_client.py mongo_data_loader.py
scripts.verify: npm run lint:web && npm run build:web && npm run test:api
